topics.title: Trump's Foreign Policy and Iran Negotiations
topics.summary: Recent news highlights Donald Trump's focus on foreign policy, particularly regarding negotiations with Iran. He emphasizes the importance of the Abraham Accords and suggests that more countries should join these agreements as part of any deal with Iran. Trump's statements reflect his ongoing efforts to position himself as a peace broker in the Middle East, despite criticism from various quarters about the potential implications of such deals.
topics.titleZh: 特朗普的外交政策与伊朗谈判
topics.summaryZh: 最近的新闻突显了唐纳德·特朗普对外交政策的关注，特别是与伊朗的谈判。他强调了亚伯拉罕协议的重要性，并建议更多国家应加入这些协议，作为与伊朗达成任何协议的一部分。特朗普的声明反映了他在中东地区作为和平调解者的持续努力，尽管来自各方的批评声不断，质疑此类交易的潜在影响。

topics.title: Trump's Health and Medical Checkup
topics.summary: Donald Trump is scheduled for a routine annual medical exam, which has garnered attention as he approaches his 80th birthday. This event is significant as it raises questions about his health and fitness for future political endeavors, especially considering the scrutiny he faces as a former president and potential candidate for future elections.
topics.summaryZh: 唐纳德·特朗普定于进行例行年度体检，这一事件引起了关注，因为他即将迎来80岁生日。这一事件的重要性在于它引发了人们对他健康状况和未来政治活动适应能力的质疑，尤其是考虑到他作为前总统和未来选举潜在候选人所面临的审查。

topics.title: Trump's Influence on GOP and Midterm Elections
topics.summary: Trump's actions and statements continue to shape the Republican Party's strategies as the midterm elections approach. His self-indulgent behavior is causing concerns among GOP leaders about potential losses. The dynamics within the party reflect Trump's significant influence, with many candidates seeking his endorsement while also navigating the challenges posed by his controversial legacy.
topics.titleZh: 特朗普对共和党的影响与中期选举
topics.summaryZh: 随着中期选举的临近，特朗普的行为和言论继续影响着共和党的策略。他的自我放纵行为引发了共和党领导人对潜在损失的担忧。党内的动态反映了特朗普的重大影响力，许多候选人寻求他的支持，同时也应对他有争议的遗产所带来的挑战。

summary24h.text: 与多国领导人讨论伊朗协议及亚伯拉罕协议的扩展。
在社交媒体上祝贺阵亡将士纪念日，并批评民主党。
在社交媒体上发布对民主党的批评。
接受年度体检，关注健康状况。

socialMedia.text: The Enriched Uranium (Nuclear Dust!) will either be immediately turned over to the United States to be brought home and destroyed or, preferably, in conjunction and coordination with the Islamic Republic of Iran, destroyed in place or, at another acceptable location, with the Atomic Energy Commission, or its equivalent, being witness to this process and event. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
socialMedia.textZh: 浓缩铀（核尘埃！）将立即交给美国带回国内销毁，或者更好的是，与伊朗伊斯兰共和国协调，在现场或其他可接受地点销毁，原子能委员会或其等同机构将见证这一过程和事件。感谢您对此事的关注！总统DJT

socialMedia.text: Negotiations with the Islamic Republic of Iran are proceeding nicely! It will only be a Great Deal for all or, no Deal at all — Back to the Battlefront and shooting, but bigger and stronger than ever before — And nobody wants that! During my discussions on Saturday with President Mohammed bin Salman Al Saud, of Saudi Arabia, Mohammed bin Zayed Al Nahyan, of The United Arab Emirates, Emir Tamim bin Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, Prime Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim bin Jaber Al Thani, and Minister Ali al-Thawadi, of Qatar, Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir Ahmed Shah, of Pakistan, President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, of Türkiye, President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi, of Egypt, King Abdullah II, of Jordan, and King Hamad bin Isa Al Khalifa, of Bahrain, I stated that, after all the work done by the United States to try and pull this very complex puzzle together,  it should be mandatory that all of these Countries, at a minimum, simultaneously, sign onto the Abraham Accords. Those Countries discussed are Saudi Arabia, The United Arab Emirates (already a Member!), Qatar, Pakistan, Türkiye, Egypt, Jordan, and Bahrain (already a Member!). It may be possible that one or two have a reason for not doing so, and that will be accepted, but most should be ready, willing, and able to make this Settlement with Iran a far more Historic Event than it would, otherwise, be. The Abraham Accords have proven to be, for the Countries involved (The United Arab Emirates, Bahrain, Morocco, Sudan, and Kazakhstan), a Financial, Economic, and Social BOOM, even during this time of Conflict and War, with the current Members never even suggesting leaving, or taking so much as even a pause. The reason for this is that the Abraham Accords have been great for them, and will be even better for everybody, and bring true Power, Strength, and Peace to the Middle East for the first time in 5,000 years. It will be a Document respected like no other that has ever been signed, anywhere in the World. Its level of Importance and Prestige will be unparalleled! It should start with the immediate signing by Saudi Arabia and Qatar, and everybody else should follow suit. If they don’t, they should not be part of this Deal in that it shows bad intention. In speaking to numerous of the Great Leaders mentioned above, they would be honored, as soon as our Document is signed, to have the Islamic Republic of Iran as part of the Abraham Accords. Wow, now that would be something special! This will be the most important Deal that any of these Great, but always in Conflict Countries, will ever sign. Nothing in the past, or in the future, will surpass it. Therefore, I am mandatorily requesting that all Countries immediately sign the Abraham Accords, and that, if Iran signs its Agreement with me, as President of the United States of America, it would be an Honor to have them also be part of this unparalleled World Coalition. The Middle East would be United, Powerful, and Economically Strong, like perhaps no other area, anywhere in the World! By copy of this TRUTH, I am asking my Representatives to begin, and successfully complete, the process of signing these Countries into the already Historic Abraham Accords. Thank you for your attention to this matter!DONALD J. TRUMPPRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA
socialMedia.textZh: 与伊朗伊斯兰共和国的谈判进展顺利！这将是一个伟大的交易，或者根本没有交易——回到战场和枪战，但比以往任何时候都更大更强——而且没有人想要那样！在我周六与沙特阿拉伯的穆罕默德·本·萨勒曼总统、阿联酋的穆罕默德·本·扎耶德·阿尔·纳哈扬、卡塔尔的塔米姆·本·哈马德·本·哈利法·阿尔·萨尼总理、阿联酋的阿里·阿尔·萨瓦迪部长、巴基斯坦的赛义德·阿西姆·穆尼尔·艾哈迈德·沙赫元帅、土耳其的雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安总统、埃及的阿卜杜勒·法塔赫·塞西总统、约旦的阿卜杜拉二世国王和巴林的哈马德·本·伊萨·阿尔·哈利法国王的讨论中，我表示，在美国为尝试将这个非常复杂的拼图拼凑在一起所做的所有工作之后，所有这些国家至少应该同时签署亚伯拉罕协议。讨论的国家包括沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋（已经是成员！）、卡塔尔、巴基斯坦、土耳其、埃及、约旦和巴林（已经是成员！）。可能有一两个国家有理由不这样做，这将被接受，但大多数国家应该准备好、愿意并能够使与伊朗的和解成为一个更具历史意义的事件。亚伯拉罕协议已经证明，对于参与的国家（阿联酋、巴林、摩洛哥、苏丹和哈萨克斯坦）来说，即使在冲突和战争时期，也带来了金融、经济和社会的繁荣，现有成员甚至从未建议离开或暂停。原因在于，亚伯拉罕协议对他们来说是极好的，对每个人来说将会更好，并为中东带来真正的力量、强大和和平，这是5000年来的第一次。这将是一份在世界上任何地方签署的文件中没有其他文件可以比拟的。它的重要性和声望将是无与伦比的！应从沙特阿拉伯和卡塔尔立即签署开始，其他国家应随之而来。如果他们不这样做，他们就不应成为这项交易的一部分，因为这显示了不良意图。在与上述众多伟大领导人的交谈中，他们会感到荣幸，一旦我们的文件签署，伊朗伊斯兰共和国将成为亚伯拉罕协议的一部分。哇，那将是特别的事情！这将是这些伟大但总是处于冲突中的国家签署的最重要的交易。过去或未来没有任何事情能超越它。因此，我强烈要求所有国家立即签署亚伯拉罕协议，并且如果伊朗与我作为美国总统签署协议，能够让他们也成为这个无与伦比的世界联盟的一部分将是我的荣幸。中东将团结、强大、经济强盛，或许是世界上任何地方都无法比拟的！通过这份真相，我要求我的代表们开始并成功完成将这些国家签署到已经具有历史意义的亚伯拉罕协议的过程。感谢您对此事的关注！唐纳德·J·特朗普美国总统

socialMedia.text: Mike: Thank you for your nice words on Fox. We are on the same path. Keep up the great work. Good luck on the Show! President DJT

socialMedia.text: RT @realDonaldTrumpHappy Memorial Day to all, including the Dumocrats, who disrespect our Military and all of the tremendous success that it has had over the last year. God Bless those that have made the ultimate sacrifice. I love you all! President DONALD J. TRUMP
socialMedia.textZh: 转发 @realDonaldTrump祝大家阵亡将士纪念日快乐，包括那些不尊重我们军队及其在过去一年中取得的巨大成功的民主党人。愿上帝保佑那些做出最终牺牲的人。我爱你们所有人！总统唐纳德·J·特朗普
